# Ahmed Dawod — Industrial Bearings & Components (أحمد داود لتجارة رولمان البلي)

> Official website: https://ahmeddawod.com
> Languages: Arabic (primary), English
> Industry: Industrial bearings, linear motion, ball screws, and precision components
> Location: Egypt — nationwide shipping

## About

Ahmed Dawod is a leading Egyptian supplier specializing in importing and distributing all types and sizes of original bearings (رولمان بلي) from top global brands. We serve industrial, manufacturing, and engineering sectors across Egypt.

## Product Categories (589+ products)

- **Bearings (بلي)**: Deep groove (6000 series), needle bearings, one-way clutch bearings, cam followers, stud bearings, high-temperature & stainless steel bearings, die bearings, spindle bearings, miniature bearings
- **Linear Motion (لينير)**: Linear bearings, linear shafts
- **Ball Screw (بول سكرو)**: Ball screw shafts, ball screw nuts, ready-made cones
- **Hard Chrome (هارد كروم)**: Hard chrome bearings, hard chrome shafts (with/without base)
- **Lead Screw (ليد سكرو)**: Lead screw assemblies
- **Fasteners (تثبيتات)**: Ball screw mounts, chrome mounts, nuts & accessories
- **Housings (كراسي)**: Plastic, stainless steel, cast iron, and specialty housings
- **Pulleys & Sleeves (جلب)**: Adapter sleeves, split taper bushings, toothed pulleys
- **Misc (منتجات متنوعة)**: Lubricants, industrial seals

## Brands

SKF, FAG, NSK, NTN, KOYO, NACHI, INA, IKO, THK, TIMKEN, NMB, ZKL, HAXB, GPZ, CX, KG, HCH, EZO, JNS, ZWZ, LYC, C&U, ASAHI, FYH, TR, UBC, KBS, SAMICK, TBI, SFU, FK, BK, FF, HIWIN, PMI, CSK, SBC, CPC

## Features

- 🛒 Full e-commerce with WhatsApp checkout
- 🔍 Product search by model number, name, or dimensions
- 📐 Bearing dimension configurator (inner × outer × width)
- 💰 Dynamic pricing with coupon system
- 📱 PWA — works offline
- 🤖 Built-in AI assistant for product queries
- 🌐 Bilingual: Arabic + English
- 📦 Nationwide shipping across Egypt

## Ordering

Orders are placed via WhatsApp after selecting products. Payment methods: Cash on Delivery, InstaPay, Vodafone Cash.

## Contact

- WhatsApp: +201000060164

- Address: Egypt
